name: Averox, Inc.
summary: Averox, Inc. provides information technology and telecom engineering, technology, and consulting services for small, medium, and large enterprises worldwide. The company offers project management, program management, system integration, offshore development, network management and maintenance, site acquisition, telecom implementation, drive test RF planning, Web design services, Web development services, search engine optimization, open source integration and customization, and virtual employee services; and civil, mechanical, and electrical works. Its solutions include dynamic sim allocation, sponsored call, mobile network optimization and performance management, intelligent pricing/dynamic tariffing, fraud management, interconnect and retail billing, mediation, microwave, mobile switching center, digital multiplexers, operations maintenance center, digital cross connect, triple play billing, and broadband billing solutions. The company is based in Novi, Michigan.
